question: List each state and its corresponding average monthly consumption per capita, grouped by state and ordered from the highest average consumption to the lowest.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE ORDER BY AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) DESC;
predicted_sql:
SELECT dg.state, AVG(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS average_monthly_consumption_per_capita 
FROM fact_household_consumption fhc 
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy dg ON fhc.geography_id = dg.geography_id 
GROUP BY dg.state 
ORDER BY average_monthly_consumption_per_capita DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT dg.state, AVG(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS average_monthly_consumption_per_capita
